description: NestJS/backend-stack preset. Extends the shared default and adds groupings for the Arcanada backend stack (NestJS, Prisma, Zod, BullMQ, Fastify, pino) per documentation/architecture/backend-stack-standards.md.

packageRules.description: Keep the @nestjs/* family on one version bump — mixed core/common/platform versions break DI resolution.
Prisma client + CLI must stay pinned to the same version.
BullMQ + its Redis client move together.
Test tooling stays on one bump to avoid API-mismatch breakage.
